name: Dr. Kate MacKenzie
bio: Dr. Kate MacKenzie is a bassoonist, educator, arts administrator, and advocate dedicated to fostering vibrant artistic communities. She is the newly appointed Executive Director of The Sound Ensemble, and longtime performing member. As a bassoon historian, Dr. MacKenzie's research focuses on the overlooked contributions of women in bassoon performance. She has presented lectures and workshops at the International Double Reed Society and the Meg Quigley Bassoon Symposium. Her work on performance anxiety and gender has been published in The Double Reed Journal. She earned her DMA at Arizona State University.
